title: Edit-run-debug confidence and clarity
scope: Compile vs runtime vs test failure clarity
tasks: Run a passing starter solution and inspect state transitions.
Inject a syntax error and verify compile diagnostics are legible.
Inject logically wrong code and inspect failing test evidence.
Reload after edits and confirm draft/custom test persistence.
Repeat on narrow viewport using mobile tabs.
riskAreas: Hidden coupling between problem switch and draft storage
